title: 03 glass jelly street
prompt: Images lock Tina, blue hoodie, product, rear seat, car interior, and camera. Outside the windows, every house on the night street has become a full-scale translucent soft glass-jelly structure. Warm inhabited rooms, stairs, plumbing, families, and snacks remain visible through luminous gummy walls; roofs and windows wobble slightly but hold their architecture. Tina watches from the unchanged dark back seat. Make the entire street obey one material swap. No dollhouses, cutaway diagrams, candy castle, empty city, or transformation inside the car.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished, coherent cinematic Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, storyboard, contact sheet, or design sheet. Treat every impossible event as a physical rule inside one photographed world. Preserve only the reference roles declared in each job. Keep Tina in the back seat whenever she appears in a car; Raul and Meg belong together in high-school football bleachers; Liz and John belong together on campus. Both gummy center and peel are edible. Candy stretches rather than tears. Favor good weirdness, readable scale, benign wonder, and appetizing tactile materials. No weapons, gore, horror, generic portals, rainbow arches, captions, borders, watermarks, or invented package copy.
